calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Sherwood, Esq. of Zwicker & Associates, T: 510.409.6199, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing was held on PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's HEARING ON the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Aaron J. Bellarosa. Plaintiff's counsel reiterated that the funds held were not from an exempt source. The Court understands that the claimant is in dire need financially, but there being no appearance by the claimant and his non-compliance with the Court's previous instructions to meet and confer, the Court ruled as follows:

The CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Aaron J. Bellarosa is denied. The levying officer shall release all funds held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The clerk shall serve the order on all parties, including a certified copy to the sheriff's deparment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Continued To Aug-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kari Morris, Esq. specially appearing for plaintiff and moving party, on Court Call;
Aaron Bellaros, Tel:917.531.7716, defendant/judgment debtor appearing on his own behalf, on Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court verified and confirmed certain information from both plaintiff and defendant. The Court suggested that parties meet and confer to reach an agreeable resolution to this issue.

After hearing, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's HEARING ON the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Aaron J. Bellarosa is continued to August 19, 2019 at 9:30 am. Prior to the next hearing, parties are required to email the Court as to the status of the meet and confer and a payment schedule.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Aaron Bellarosa, a/k/a Aaron J. Bellarosa.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brittni Christopher, CSR #10791. Telephone: 415-551-3745. Email: bchristopher@sftc.org.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank.
No appearance by defendant Aaron Belarosa, a/k/a Aaron J. Bellarosa.
Plaintiff's complaint for was filed on January 17, 2018 and served via substitute service on January 21, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on July 10, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 20, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 9, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Aaron Bellarosa, a/k/a Aaron J. Bellarosa, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,791.74.
Costs - $679.95.

Total - $29,471.69.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
